title: Add tests to verify CORs is enabled

comments.body: @edsantiago Mind doing a quick review on the test?
Ummm, I wonder why the service wasn't running :thinking:
Actually, since you need to resubmit, could I ask you to add a new test, one that confirms that CORS headers are *not* present when run by default? Thanks.

LGTM
once @edsantiago 's latest comments are addressed.
